1.name: §g§lSpin Attack
1.description:
§6Click Combo:§r §d§lRIGHT§f-§d§lLEFT§f-§d§lRIGHT

§7Slashes rapidly around you,
damaging enemies over a large area.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f40
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f150% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 120%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 30%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f4.5 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

2.name: §f§lDagger Proficiency I
2.description:
§7Increases your Walk Speed and
§nMain Attack§7's damage by §f+5%§7.

3.name: §f§lCheaper Spin Attack
3.description:
§7Reduce the Mana cost of §nSpin Attack§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost:§r -10

4.name: §h§lDouble Spin
4.description:
§7§nSpin Attack§7 will activate twice, with a
larger area of effect on the second hit.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §c-40% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: -40%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f+2 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

5.name: §g§lDash
5.description:
§6Click Combo:§r §d§lRIGHT§f-§d§lRIGHT§f-§d§lRIGHT

§7Dash in the direction
you're facing.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f20

6.name: §g§lMultihit
6.description:
§6Click Combo:§r §d§lRIGHT§f-§d§lLEFT§f-§d§lLEFT

§7Unleashes a rapid flurry of §f8 §7hits to enemies
facing you, dealing heavy damage.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f40
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f40% §8(of your DPS, per hit)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 30%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 10%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f3 Blocks §7(Cone-Shaped)

7.name: §g§lSmoke Bomb
7.description:
§6Click Combo:§r §d§lRIGHT§f-§d§lRIGHT§f-§d§lLEFT

§7Throws a bomb that slowly emanates smoke,
damaging all enemies in it every §f0.5s§7.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f35
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f35% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 25%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 5%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 5%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f10 Blocks
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f5s
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f3 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

8.name: §f§lCheaper Dash
8.description:
§7Reduce the Mana cost of §nDash§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost:§r -5

9.name: §h§lDouble Slice
9.description:
§7Your §nMain Attack§7 will hit twice,
but deal §f-40% §7damage per hit.

10.name: §h§lPoisoned Blade
10.description:
§7For every §f2% §7or §f2 Raw §7Main Attack Damage you have
from items, gain §f+5/3s §7Poison Damage. (Max 50/3s)

Your §nMain Attack§7 gains additional range.

§2➼ §7Range: §f+1 Block

11.name: §f§lAir Mastery
11.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Air attacks.

§f❋§7 Air Damage: §f+3-4
§f❋§7 Air Damage:§f +15%

12.name: §f§lEarth Mastery
12.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Earth attacks.

§2✤§7 Earth Damage: §r+2-4
§2✤§7 Earth Damage: §r+20%

13.name: §f§lFire Mastery
13.description:
§7Increases your base damage
from all Fire attacks.

§c✹ §7Fire Damage:§f +3-5
§c✹§7 Fire Damage:§f +15%

14.name: §f§lThunder Mastery
14.description:
§7Increases your base damage from all Thunder attacks.

§e✦§7 Thunder Damage:§r +1-8
§e✦§7 Thunder Damage:§r +10%

15.name: §f§lWater Mastery
15.description:
§7Increase your damage
from all Water attacks.

§b❉§7 Water Damage:§r +2-4
§b❉§7 Water Damage:§r +15%

16.name: §i§lBackstab
16.description:
§7If cast while in §nVanish§7, §nMultihit§7 becomes a
single devastating strike. Hitting an enemy 
from behind deals §fdouble §7the damage.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f-5
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f300% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 250%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 50%)

17.name: §k§lVanish
17.description:
§7Gain the ability to hide in the shadows. Every
§f0.5s§7, gain §f+1 §bShade §8⬣§7. §8(Max 10)§7

Casting §nDash§7 with §f10 §bShade§7 will cause you to
disappear, granting invisibility. While in this
state, you instead consume §f-1 §bShade §8⬣§7
every §f0.5s§7 and cannot heal.

Attacking, getting hit, or losing all §bShade §8⬣§7 will
cancel this state. You cannot have more than
§f8 §bShade §8⬣§7 when you leave §nVanish§7.

§e✧ §7Effect: §fInvisibility to Self

18.name: §h§lSticky Bomb
18.description:
§7§nSmoke Bomb§7 will stick to enemies
and deal additional damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+10% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: +10%)

19.name: §h§lPetal Storm
19.description:
§7A maximum sized §nJasmine Bloom§7 will transform
§nSwan Dive§7 into a huge petal storm, consuming
you bloom to give it increased damage and range.

§c⚔ §7Explosion Damage: §f+200%
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f3 Blocks

20.name: §h§lRighting Reflex
20.description:
§7When you hold shift while airborne, slowly
glide and become immune to fall damage. (Max 10s)

21.name: §h§lSurprise Strike
21.description:
§7Attacking during §nVanish§7 will boost the
damage of your attack's first hit by §f+80%§7.

22.name: §k§lMirror Image
22.description:
§7Summon §b3 Clones §#c267f7 §7after using §nDash§7
that will follow and protect you.

When hit, lose a §bMirror Clone §#c267f7§7, reducing
§f-25% §7of incoming damage and granting you
a damage bonus for §f3s§7. (1s cooldown)

§e✧ §7Effect: §f30% §7Damage Bonus (§a⚔§7) to Self
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f15s

23.name: §k§lLacerate
23.description:
§7§nSpin Attack§7 will lunge you forward,
deal §f3 §7strikes and then lunge you upward.

Using §nHop§7 while §nLacerate§7 is active launches you further.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f90% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 60%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 20%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 10%)

24.name: §h§lLast Laugh
24.description:
§7When losing any §bClone §#c267f7§#f5cfff§#d84c4c§7, it will cast
one of your spells before dying.

§bMirror Clones §#c267f7 §7will cast §nMultihit§7
before dying.

25.name: §h§lMerciless
25.description:
§7When cast twice in a row, §nCleave§7
deals additional damage and does
not increase your spell costs.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+20% §8(of your DPS, when cast twice)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +20%)

26.name: §i§lWall of Smoke
26.description:
§7§nSmoke Bomb§7 will throw §f+2 §7bombs.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §c-10% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: -10%)

27.name: §h§lFatality
27.description:
§7§nMultihit§7 will deal an additional final hit.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f120% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 90%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 30%)

28.name: §f§lPsithurism
28.description:
§7Increase your Walk Speed by §f+20%
§7and your Jump Height by §f+1§7.

29.name: §i§lCleave
29.description:
§7§nSpin Attack§7 becomes a single deadly slash,
but only hits in front of you.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f230% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 160%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 50%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 20%)

30.name: §f§lCheaper Multihit
30.description:
§7Reduce the Mana cost of §nMultihit§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost:§r -5

31.name: §f§lRolling Fog
31.description:
§7Increase §nSmoke Bomb§7's §2➼§7 Range
and §3☀§7 Area of Effect.

§2➼ §7Range: §f+10 Blocks
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f+1 Block §7(Circle-Shaped)

32.name: §h§lShadow Travel
32.description:
§7Gain a speed boost while in §nVanish§7.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+120%§7 Speed Bonus (§3➲§7) to Self

33.name: §h§lDistraction
33.description:
§7Detonating §f15+ §bTricks §#6afa65 §7on enemies will
temporarily reduce their damage.

Debuffs applied with §bTricks §#6afa65 §7will last
§f+0.4s §7longer for each extra §bTrick §#6afa65
§7detonated beyond the requirement.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f-15% §7Damage Bonus (§c⚔§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f10s

34.name: §j§lBamboozle
34.description:
§7§nMultihit§7 will instead teleport you forward
and strike with a brutal fiery slash.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f350% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 300%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 50%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f6 Blocks
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f5 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f5s

35.name: §f§lCheaper Smoke Bomb
35.description:
§7Reduce the Mana cost of §nSmoke Bomb§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost:§r -5

36.name: §f§lBlazing Powder
36.description:
§7§nSpin Attack§7, §nCleave§7, and §nLacerate§7 will
deal additional damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+20% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: +20%)

37.name: §j§lWeightless
37.description:
§7You gain §f+1 §7Mana if you
hit an enemy while airborne.
§8(1.25+ blocks off the
ground to be airborne)

38.name: §i§lOmen of Death
38.description:
§7While in §nVanish§7, §nFatality§7 afflicts enemies
it strikes with §bDoomed §4☠§7.

Striking §bDoomed §4☠§7 enemies with §nBackstab§7
consumes §f-6 §bShade §8⬣ §7and §fguarantees§7 a
successful §nBackstab§7.

If §nBackstab§7 would have been successful
anyway, §ftriple§7 its damage instead.

Increase §nFatality§7's damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+60% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +60%)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f0.5s

40.name: §i§lSandbagging
40.description:
§7Reduces the cooldown on all of your
abilities by §f30% §7every time you get hit
for less than §f10% §7of your max health.

§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f1s

41.name: §h§lBlack Hole
41.description:
§7§nSmoke Bomb§7 will pull nearby enemies.

§2➼ §7Range: §f6 Blocks

42.name: §j§lShadow Dance
42.description:
§7Upon exiting §nVanish§7 by attacking, your
next attack also gains its effects.

If you do not have enough §bShade §8⬣§7 to
activate an ability, consume §f3§7 Mana per
§bShade §8⬣§7 you lack to trigger it anyway.

Striking a §bDoomed §4☠§7 enemy with your
§nMain Attack§7 or a §nPowder Special§7 reduces
the cooldown of §nShadow Arsenal§7 and §nMain
Attack§7 to §f0.5s§7.

§d⌛ §7Duration: §f1s

43.name: §k§lNoxious Haze
43.description:
§7§nSmoke Bomb§7 makes you and any allies
become §bNoxious §#eb3dfe§7 while standing in it,
which lingers after leaving the area.

While §bNoxious §#eb3dfe§7, deal §f+10% §7damage to
enemies for every debuff they have. §8(Max 5)
§7Allies only receive §c30% §7of the bonus.

§d⌛ §7Duration: §f3s

44.name: §k§lMarked
44.description:
§7§nSmoke Bomb§7 and §nFatality§7 will add §bMarks §c☀§7
to enemies hit. §8(Max 20)§7

§7§nSmoke Bomb§7 adds §f+1 §bMarks §c☀§7.
§7§nFatality§7 adds §f+5 §bMarks §c☀§7.

Striking an enemy with §nBackstab§7 or a
§nPowder Special§7 will consume all §bMarks §c☀§7
to increase your attack's damage.

§nBackstab§7 gains §f+5%§7 damage per §bMark §c☀§7.
§nPowder Specials§7 gain §f+3%§7 damage per §bMark §c☀§7.

Enemies lose §f-1 §bMark §c☀§7 every §f1s§7 after none
have been added for §f5s§7.

45.name: §h§lViolent Vortex
45.description:
§7Dealing over §f2x §7your max health as
damage in a single hit will deal §f30% §7of
the damage to nearby enemies and briefly
blind them.

§e✧ §7Effect: §fBlindness §7(§c⬣§7) to Enemies
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f10 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f1s
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f1s

46.name: §j§lEcho
46.description:
§7After losing a §bMirror Clone §#c267f7§7, your
next §nSpin Attack§7 or §nSmoke Bomb§7 will be
copied by all active §bClones §#c267f7§#f5cfff§#d84c4c§7, but deal
§c-25%§7 damage.

47.name: §j§lShurikens
47.description:
§7After using §nDash§7, you prepare
§f+3 §7shurikens §8(Max 9)§7.

Your next §nMain Attack §7will throw all
your prepared shurikens.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f120% §8(of your DPS, per shuriken)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 100%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 20%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f50 Blocks

49.name: §h§lDancing Blade
49.description:
§7When using §nSwan Dive§7 with §f3+ §bMomentum §f➲§7, you
will leap back into the air §f0.25s §7after landing.

50.name: §f§lCheaper Dash II
50.description:
§7Reduce the Mana cost of §nDash§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost:§r -5

51.name: §f§lCheaper Multihit II
51.description:
§7Reduce the Mana cost of §nMultihit§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost:§r -5

52.name: §f§lCheaper Smoke Bomb II
52.description:
§7Reduce the Mana cost of §nSmoke Bomb§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost:§r -5

53.name: §f§lCheaper Spin Attack II
53.description:
§7Reduce the Mana cost of §nSpin Attack§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost:§r -5

54.name: §h§lLurking Presence
54.description:
§7§nBleeding Edge§7's duration no longer 
decreases while in §nVanish§7.

Applying §bMarks §c☀§7 will now also add
to §f0.1s§7 its duration.

56.name: §f§lImpending Doom
56.description:
§7§nFatality§7 deals more damage and
inflicts §bDoomed §4§4☠§7 for §f+0.1s§7 longer
for each §bKnife§7 you have.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+30% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +30%)

57.name: §k§lNightcloak Knives
57.description:
§7Casting §nDash§7 while in §nVanish§7 will consume
§bMarks §c☀ §7from nearby enemies. For every
§f6 §bMarks §c☀ §7consumed, gain a §bKnife§7.
§8(Max 5 Knives)

§7Casting §nSmoke Bomb§7 while in §nVanish§7 with
active §bKnives§7 will instead ready them. For
§f1s§7 after your next attack, each §bKnife§7 will
deal §f25%§7 of the damage you deal before
being consumed, including the initial hit.

For each §bKnife§7 you have, increase your
maximum §bMarks §c☀§7 by §f+2§7 and the §bMarks §c☀§7
applied by §nFatality§7 by §f+1§7.

§2➼ §7Range: §f6 Blocks §8(for consuming Marks)

58.name: §h§lHoodwink
58.description:
§7After killing an enemy, salvage §f50% §7of
their §bTricks §#6afa65§7. (Max 10 per mob, 40 total)


Casting §nSpin Attack§7 while sneaking will
transfer salvaged §bTricks §#6afa65 §7onto enemies
and immediately detonate them.

59.name: §h§lThrill
59.description:
§7§nBleeding Edge§7 additionally gives you a
speed bonus.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+80% §7Speed Bonus (§3➲§7) to Self

60.name: §i§lWall Jump
60.description:
§7Reduces §nHop§7's cooldown by
§f-1s§7. Using §nHop§7 into a wall
will bounce you backward.
§8(Hold shift to cancel)

61.name: §f§lEviscerate
61.description:
§7§nLacerate§7 deals more damage,
and will slash §f+1 §7more time.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+10% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: +10%)

62.name: §i§lVolatile Primer
62.description:
§7§nViolent Vortex§7 will detonate §nSmoke Bomb§7,
causing a large explosion that immediately
deals its remaining duration's worth
of damage and effects.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f250% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 200%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 50%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f+4 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

63.name: §h§lDissolution
63.description:
§7When entering and exiting §nVanish§7, become immune to
knockback and gain resistance for a brief moment.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+70% §7Resistance Bonus (§8✾§7) to Self
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f0.15s

64.name: §i§lShrouded Slash
64.description:
§7Casting §nSpin Attack§7 or §nCleave§7 while in §nVanish§7
consumes §f-5 §bShade §8⬣§7 to increase §3☀§7 Area of
Effect and apply §f+5 §bMarks §c☀§7 to enemies hit.
§8(§nShadow Siphon§8 does not activate)§7

Hitting a §bDoomed §4☠§7 enemy will deal §f+50%§7 damage.

§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f+2 Blocks

66.name: §j§lHarvester
66.description:
§7Gain §f+1 §7Mana for every §bMark §c☀§7 you apply
or consume on a single enemy.

A successful §nBackstab§7 grants §fdouble§7 the
Mana for each §bMark §c☀§7.

68.name: §h§lBlade Fury
68.description:
§7§nMultihit§7 gains extra damage and
can be aimed in all directions.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+10% §8(of your DPS, per hit)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: +10%)

69.name: §h§lRicochets
69.description:
§7Your §nShurikens§7 will bounce §f2 §7times
between enemies upon impact.

§2➼ §7Range: §f12 Blocks

70.name: §i§lDeflagate
70.description:
§7§nBamboozle§7 coats enemies struck with a
flammable catalyst, making them §f+1% §bEnkindled §#ff8e8e§7
whenever you strike them.

The catalyst flares up when it reaches §f100%
§7or at the end of its duration, dealing damage
based on how §bEnkindled §#ff8e8e§7 the target was.

§bEnkindled §#ff8e8e§7 enemies take §f+30% §7more
§c✹ Fire §7damage from you.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f15% §8(of your DPS, per 1% Enkindle)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 12%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 3%)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f8s
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f8s

72.name: §5§lPierce the Veil
72.description:
§6Click Combo:§r §d§lF

§7Imbue yourself with the essence of
shadow, entering §nVanish§7 but without
losing the ability to heal. This state 
cannot be canceled.

While cloaked, your §bShade §8⬣§7 and your 
§bKnives§7 cannot be depleted, and your
§bKnives§7 are always readied.

Additionally, you apply §f+1 §bMark §c☀§7 and
§bDoomed §4☠§7 to nearby enemies every §f0.25s§7.

§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f10 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f12s

§7Activate abilities to charge
your §bUltimate Meter ⚡§7 to 100%.

73.name: §k§lJasmine Bloom
73.description:
§7After spending §f40 §7Mana or gaining §b4 Momentum §f➲§7,
an area underneath you blooms and damages
enemies below it every §f0.3s§7.

The duration is reset and the radius is
increased after every bloom. (Max 5 Blooms)

Using §nSwan Dive§7 with a maximum size §nJasmine Bloom§7
will trigger a massive explosion and reset the
radius of §nJasmine Bloom§7. §7(Min §f3 §bMomentum §f➲§7)

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f120% §8(of your DPS, from bloom)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 75%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 15%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 15%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 15%)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f5s
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f+1.5 Blocks §7§8(per bloom)

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f1500% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 1250%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 125%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 125%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f12 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

74.name: §j§lBleeding Edge
74.description:
§7Landing a successful §nBackstab§7 on an enemy
grants you a damage bonus. Consuming §bMarks §c☀§7
increases the duration of the bonus by §f+0.1s§7
per §bMark §c☀§7. §8(Max 7s duration)§7

Increase your maximum §bMarks §c☀§7 by §f+10§7.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+30% §7Damage Bonus (§c⚔§7) to Self
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f3s

75.name: §h§lChoke Bomb
75.description:
§7§nSmoke Bomb§7 releases a cloud of dust
every §f0.5s§7, applying §bHypoxia §#727f7b§7 for §f+2s§7.
§8(Max 10s)§7

Enemies suffering from §bHypoxia §#727f7b§7
are slowed by §f20%§7 and take §f+30%§7
more §f❋ Air§7 damage from you.

76.name: §h§lDisappearing Act
76.description:
§7Create an explosion when you summon
your §bMirror Clones §#c267f7§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f800% §8(of your DPS)

78.name: §5§lAnother Self
78.description:
§6Click Combo:§r §d§lF

§7Create a perfect clone of yourself to
work with as a united duet, it copying
every spell you cast.

The clone's health is proportional to your
own effective health, and while it lives,
the effectiveness of your debuffs is §fdoubled§7.

Casting §r§d§lF§7 again swaps your positions,
detontes §bTricks §#6afa65§7 on nearby enemies, and makes
your clone cast all available §nDamage Spells§7.

If no enemy had more than §f10 §bTricks §#6afa65§7 detonated
in the swap, the clones loses §c-2000§7 health. However,
for each §bTrick §#6afa65§7 detonated over the threshold,
those §nDamage Spells§7 deal §f3%§7 more damage.

§d⌛ §7Duration: §f20s

§7Activate abilities or take damage to charge
your §bUltimate Meter ⚡§7 to 100%.

§bShade §8⬣§7 whenever they hit enemies.

§7§nSpin Attack§7 and §7§nCleave§7 grant §f+1 §bShade §8⬣§7.
§7§nFatality§7 grants §f+2 §bShade §8⬣§7.

Killing an enemy grants §f+6 §bShade §8⬣§7.
